name: Parmesan Herb Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Grease the bottoms of a 12-cup muffin pan or line with paper baking cups.
3. In a measuring cup, lightly spoon flour and level off. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, sage, parsley, and Parmesan cheese; stir until well combined.
4. Add butter/sour milk (or margarine) and egg; mix just until the dry ingredients are moistened.
5. Fill each prepared muffin cup about 2/3 full.
6. Bake at 400°F for 15 to 20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Serve hot.
MICROWAVE DIRECTIONS:
1. Prepare the muffin batter as directed above.
2. Using a 6-cup microwave-safe muffin pan lined with paper baking cups (fill each cup about half full), sprinkle the top of each muffin with cornflake crumbs.
3. Microwave on HIGH for 2½ to 3 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean, rotating the pan halfway through cooking.
4. Remove the muffins from the pan and discard the outer paper cups immediately. Allow to cool for 1 minute before serving. Repeat with remaining batter.
